OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-27-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Regent Cab's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his IME on a date to be agreed upon by counsel, but no later than October 31, 2006. The court finds that the $500 cancellation fee was reasonable and that Plaintiff had notice of that fee. Plaintiff is ordered to pay $1,000 to Dr. Soong within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to pay sanctions to Defendant in the amount of $300, payable within 30 days of notice of this order, as reasonable fees incurred in making this motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
